upstream.repository_status: Research repository with low visible activity; audit pinned an exact commit instead of floating main.

200a_bcf.title: Factorizers for distributed sparse block codes

requirements_and_platform.platform_expectation: Linux or WSL with CUDA is the practical path; native Windows build was not audited.

competitor_environment.strategy: WSL2 Ubuntu + separate conda Python 3.11 env + official cu121 PyTorch wheels

initial_failed_attempt.strategy: WSL2 Ubuntu + conda install pytorch torchvision pytorch-cuda=12.1 -c pytorch -c nvidia
initial_failed_attempt.result: torch import failed before audit smoke
initial_failed_attempt.classification: Environment packaging issue, not an upstream algorithm blocker
